title: teucrium commune proles rouyanum
intro: Teucrium commune proles rouyanum, also known as the alpine germander, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Teucrium commune proles rouyanum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve digestion, reduce anxiety and stress, and support the immune system. Teucrium commune proles rouyanum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like liver and kidney problems.
